content.text: I'll start by reading the key files to understand the existing patterns before making any changes.
Now let me read more of server.js to understand the Bedrock call pattern and the rest of the routes:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json"><meta name="theme-color" content="#060a14"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0">
<title>MAGI — Council Canvas</title>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/core.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/components.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/atom-one-dark.min.css">
<style>
/* ═══ LAYOUT ═══ */
.app{display:flex;height:100dvh;position:relative}

/* ═══ CHAT SIDEBAR ═══ */
.chat-sidebar{width:260px;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-right:1px solid var(--glass-border);z-index:5;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;transition:margin-left .25s var(--ease-out)}
.chat-sidebar.collapsed{margin-left:-260px}

.sb-header{padding:14px 16px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.sb-logo{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--color-accent),var(--color-primary));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.sb-tag{font-size:8px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-top:2px}
.sb-toggle{margin-left:auto;width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text-tertiary);border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.sb-toggle:hover{background:var(--glass-hover);color:var(--text-secondary)}

.sb-new{margin:10px 12px;padding:11px;border:1px dashed rgba(99,102,241,.2);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(99,102,241,.04),rgba(52,211,153,.03));color:var(--color-primary);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s var(--ease-out);text-align:center;letter-spacing:.3px}
.sb-new:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(99,102,241,.1),rgba(52,211,153,.06));border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.3);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(99,102,241,.08)}

.sb-section{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:12px 16px 4px}

.sb-sessions{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px 8px}
.sb-sess{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--duration-fast);margin-bottom:2px;border:1px solid transparent}
.sb-sess:hover{background:var(--glass)}
.sb-sess.active{background:var(--color-primary-dim);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12)}
.sb-sess-icon{font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.sb-sess-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.sb-sess-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-primary);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.sb-sess-meta{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:1px}
.sb-sess-del{opacity:0;width:20px;height:20px;border:none;background:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--duration-fast);flex-shrink:0}
.sb-sess:hover .sb-sess-del{opacity:1}
.sb-sess-del:hover{background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);color:var(--color-danger)}

.sb-footer{padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);display:flex;gap:6px}
.sb-foot-btn{flex:1;padding:6px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text-tertiary);border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.sb-foot-btn:hover{background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-secondary)}

/* ═══ MAIN AREA ═══ */
.main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;z-index:1;min-width:0}

/* Top bar */
.topbar{height:var(--topbar-height);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 16px;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(10,14,28,.5);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px)}
.tb-hamburger{width:30px;height:30px;border:none;background:none;color:var(--text-tertiary);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:var(--radius-md);transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.tb-hamburger:hover{background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-secondary)}
.tb-hamburger.hidden{display:none}
.tb-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);flex:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.tb-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 12px;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:999px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary)}
.tb-help{width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);color:var(--text-tertiary);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.tb-help:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.08);color:var(--color-primary);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.15)}

/* Help panel */
.help-panel{position:fixed;top:var(--topbar-height);right:0;width:min(380px,100vw);height:calc(100vh - var(--topbar-height));background:rgba(10,14,28,.95);border-left:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);z-index:50;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform .25s var(--ease-out)}
.help-panel.show{transform:translateX(0)}
.help-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.help-section{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:18px 0 8px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.help-card{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);margin-bottom:6px}
.help-card:hover{background:var(--glass-hover)}
.help-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.help-card-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 6px currentColor}
.help-card-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600}
.help-card-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary)}
.help-card-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.5}
.help-feature{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.help-feature:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.help-feature-icon{font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;width:28px;text-align:center}
.help-feature-info{flex:1}
.help-feature-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:2px}
.help-feature-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-tertiary);line-height:1.5}

/* ═══ CHAT AREA ═══ */
.chat-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;padding-bottom:160px}
.cards-area{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}

/* Council Visualizer */
.council-viz{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 8px;padding:12px 0;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.viz-strip{display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:0 8px}
.viz-agent{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s var(--ease-out);padding:4px 6px;border-radius:10px;min-width:52px}
.viz-agent:hover{background:var(--glass)}
.viz-agent.speaking{transform:scale(1.08)}
.viz-avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;position:relative;transition:all .3s var(--ease-out);border:2px solid transparent}
.viz-avatar::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid transparent;transition:all .3s;animation:none}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-avatar{border-color:var(--color-primary);box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(52,211,153,.3)}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-avatar::after{border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.3);animation:vizPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-avatar{border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.4);animation:vizBreathe 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.viz-name{font-size:8px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-tertiary);text-align:center;max-width:52px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;transition:color .3s}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-name{color:var(--color-accent)}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-name{color:var(--color-warning)}
.viz-status{position:absolute;bottom:-1px;right:-1px;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid var(--bg-base);background:var(--text-tertiary)}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-status{background:var(--color-accent);box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(52,211,153,.5)}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-status{background:var(--color-warning)}
.viz-bubble{position:absolute;top:-24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:rgba(14,18,36,.9);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:8px;color:var(--text-secondary);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-bubble,.viz-agent.thinking .viz-bubble{opacity:1}

Let me continue reading the rest of the server to find the WebSocket chat handler and roundtable patterns:
Now let me read the roundtable page and check the chat page for the send button area:

⚙️ Settings
Presets
Agent Intensity
Reasoning Mode

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json"><meta name="theme-color" content="#060a14"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Roundtable — MAGI</title>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/core.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/components.css">
<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
<style>
/* Layout */
.layout{display:flex;min-height:100vh;position:relative;z-index:1}
.rt-sidebar{width:280px;border-right:1px solid var(--glass-border);padding:20px 16px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:rgba(0,0,0,.15);overflow-y:auto;max-height:100vh;position:sticky;top:0;transition:margin-left .25s var(--ease-out)}
.rt-sidebar.collapsed{margin-left:-280px}
.rt-main{flex:1;padding:32px 40px 80px;max-width:900px;overflow-y:auto}

/* Sidebar toggle for mobile */
.rt-hamburger{display:none}
.rt-overlay{display:none}
.rt-overlay.show{display:block}

/* Sidebar */
.sidebar-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.sidebar-header a{color:var(--text-tertiary);text-decoration:none;display:flex;align-items:center;transition:color .2s}
.sidebar-header a:hover{color:var(--text-primary)}
.sidebar-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary)}
.sidebar-label{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-tertiary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;margin:16px 0 8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}

.history-item{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;border:1px solid transparent;margin-bottom:4px}
.history-item:hover{background:var(--glass);border-color:var(--glass-border)}
.history-item.active{background:var(--color-primary-dim);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.15)}
.history-topic{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
.history-meta{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:3px;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center}
.history-empty{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-tertiary);padding:12px;text-align:center;font-style:italic}

/* Header */
.page-header{margin-bottom:32px}
.page-title{font-size:28px;font-weight:800;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--color-primary),var(--color-accent));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;letter-spacing:-.5px}
.page-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:4px}

/* Mode Tabs */
.mode-tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;background:var(--glass);border-radius:10px;padding:4px;margin-bottom:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.mode-tab{flex:1;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .25s var(--ease-out);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-tertiary);position:relative}
.mode-tab:hover{color:var(--text-secondary)}
.mode-tab.active{background:var(--color-primary-dim);color:var(--color-primary);box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(99,102,241,.15)}
.mode-tab .tab-icon{font-size:16px;display:block;margin-bottom:3px}
.mode-tab .tab-desc{font-size:9px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:2px;display:none}
.mode-tab.active .tab-desc{display:block;color:rgba(99,102,241,.7)}

/* Input Area */
.input-area{margin-bottom:24px}
.topic-input{width:100%;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:14px;font-family:inherit;resize:none;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);min-height:80px}
.topic-input:focus{border-color:var(--color-primary)}
.topic-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-tertiary)}

/* Agent Selection */
.agents-section{margin-bottom:24px}
.agents-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.agents-label button{font-size:10px;color:var(--color-primary);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-weight:600}
.agents-label button:hover{text-decoration:underline}
.agents-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.agent-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);cursor:pointer;transition:all .25s var(--ease-out);user-select:none}
.agent-chip:hover{border-color:var(--glass-border-hover)}
.agent-chip.selected{border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--agent-color) 40%,transparent);background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--agent-color) 6%,transparent)}
.agent-chip .dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.agent-chip .agent-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary)}
.agent-chip.selected .agent-name{color:var(--text-primary)}
.agent-chip .agent-role{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-tertiary);display:none}
.agent-chip.selected .agent-role{display:inline}

/* Start Button */
.start-btn{width:100%;padding:14px;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--color-primary),#818cf8);color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s var(--ease-out);letter-spacing:.3px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.start-btn:hover:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(99,102,241,.25)}
.start-btn:active:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(0)}
.start-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}
.start-btn.running{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,#f87171);animation:pulse-btn 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pulse-btn{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(239,68,68,.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(239,68,68,0)}}

/* Results */
.results-area{margin-top:32px}
.results-header{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.results-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}

/* Agent Response Card */
.agent-card{border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s var(--ease-out);position:relative}
.agent-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:3px;border-radius:3px 0 0 3px}
.agent-card-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:16px 18px 10px}
.agent-emoji{font-size:22px;line-height:1}
.agent-info .card-agent-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary)}
.agent-info .card-agent-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary)}
.agent-card-body{padding:0 18px 16px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--text-secondary)}
.agent-card-body p{margin-bottom:8px}
.agent-card-body strong{color:var(--text-primary);font-weight:600}
.agent-card-body ul,.agent-card-body ol{margin:6px 0 8px 18px}
.agent-card-body li{margin-bottom:3px}
.agent-card-body h2,.agent-card-body h3{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin:10px 0 4px}
.agent-card-body code{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px}
.agent-card-body blockquote{border-left:2px solid var(--color-primary);padding-left:10px;margin:8px 0;color:var(--text-tertiary);font-style:italic}
.agent-card-footer{padding:8px 18px 12px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-tertiary);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}

[411 more lines in file. Use offset=101 to continue.]

4. POST /api/deep-think/:id/visual

🧠 Deep Think
Multi-agent debate & synthesis. Throw a topic — 3 agents analyze, debate, and produce a unified plan.
Select Debate Agents (3 recommended)
1 Phase 1: Initial Analysis — agents forming positions...
2 Phase 2: Debate — agents challenging each other...
3 Phase 3: Synthesis — producing unified plan...
📜 Past Deep Thinks

content.text:
The route is working correctly — it returns "Deep Think not found" for a fake ID, which is the expected behavior. All three features are fully implemented and tested.

Here's a summary of what was built:

---

## Completed: 3 Features for MAGI v2

### Feature 1: 🧠 Deep Think (Backend + Frontend)

**Backend (`server.js`):**
- `callBedrockSimple(prompt, agentId)` — non-streaming Bedrock helper that collects full response as string, reusing existing `streamAI()` infrastructure
- `POST /api/deep-think` — 3-phase debate: Initial Analysis → Debate → Synthesis. Uses parallel `Promise.all()` for phases 1 & 2. Saves to `data/deep-thinks.json`. Admin-only.
- `GET /api/deep-think` — Lists past deep thinks

**Frontend (`~/magi-v2/frontend/deep-think/index.html`):**
- Full page with topic textarea, agent selector (checkboxes for all 12 agents, defaults: Rafael, Uriel, Samael)
- 3-step progress indicator (Phase 1 → 2 → 3)
- Results displayed with agent cards showing initial takes, debate responses, and synthesis
- Synthesis highlighted with special card styling
- "Generate Visual Plan" and "Save to Obsidian" buttons
- Past deep thinks history at bottom
- Consistent with existing MAGI v2 design system

### Feature 2: 🎨 Visual Planner

**Backend:**
- `POST /api/deep-think/:id/visual` — Generates a self-contained HTML page with:
  - Timeline of the debate (Phase 1 + Phase 2 entries)
  - Agent positions compared (side-by-side cards)
  - Risk matrix (High/Medium/Low color-coded grid)
  - Full synthesis section
  - CSS-based styling (no D3), dark theme, responsive
- Saves to `~/magi-v2/frontend/diagrams/deep-think-{id}.html`

### Feature 3: 👼 Auto-Agent Button

**Backend:**
- `POST /api/suggest-agent` — Takes a message, uses Bedrock to pick the best agent from the full roster. Returns `{ agentId, agentName }`. Tested: correctly suggested Azrael for cost questions, Gabriel for marketing tasks.

**Frontend — Chat page:**
- 👼 button added next to Send button with gold glow hover effect
- Calls `suggestAgent()` which hits the API, then auto-switches to Private mode with the suggested agent via `pickAgent()`

**Frontend — Roundtable page:**
- 👼 button added next to Start Roundtable button
- Suggests an agent and auto-adds it to the selected agents set

### Navigation
- "Deep Think" (🧠) added to nav sidebar Core group in `nav.js`

### Data Files
- `~/magi-v2/backend/data/deep-thinks.json` created with `{"items":[]}`

### Verification
- ✅ Server restarted via PM2 (online, stable)
- ✅ All endpoints tested with curl (GET/POST deep-think, suggest-agent, visual planner)
- ✅ All frontend pages return 200
- ✅ suggest-agent correctly identifies Azrael for cost queries, Gabriel for marketing
